title: Effect Enchantment
description: A mod that aims to make all effects be enchantments for any version
body:
## Effect Enchantments
--- Effect Enchantments is a mod that adds a unique twist to your Minecraft gameplay by turning all possible potion effects into enchantments for weapons and armor! Now, you can enchant your gear with powerful effects like speed, regeneration, and many more giving you more control over your combat and survival strategies. **What Makes It Unique:** - The only mod that offers cross-version compatibility with separate versions for each Minecraft release (Currently discontinued until MC updates become more stable, however anyone is free to continue this mod as long as there give credit). **Features:** - Effects as enchantments for Weapons and Armor - Perfect for enhancing combat, exploration, and utility - Build in Combat for Enchantment Description ---
